highlight: A Q&A app built with no code within one week

subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - A Q&A app built with no code within one week: A demo can be completed by configuring BISHENG step by step
- Open-source workflow is complete and easy to reuse: The workflow covers core steps such as question generation, interaction, and feedback
- Complete continuous interaction experience: Supports changing questions, multiple guesses, viewing answers, and challenging the question
- Suitable as a first project for non-technical users: Parents and education practitioners can also build it with a low barrier

subsections.title: Demo
content: (Expected outcome preview. This video was produced by the RWAI team using [Enterprise-grade brief demo video built in two and a half days - verified].)

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Rapidly build a fun children's intellectual enlightenment application, using brain teasers here as an example. AI is used to generate different question types such as unconventional thinking and logical reasoning.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Science & Education, Culture & Sports
**Category**: Service
**Technology Category**: Natural Language Processing, Text Generation, Intelligent Q&A

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo setup: Within one week

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm expert

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Fully manual education and training usually embeds this kind of Q&A into games, so it cannot be experienced independently and lacks flexibility
- Manual education and training makes it difficult for similar Q&A services to reach a wider potential user base
- Non-technical people with education and training Q&A experience and knowledge find it difficult to develop an application on their own

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Interaction support:
- Change the question (to keep it fresh)
- Multiple guesses (to encourage trying)
- Ask for the answer (instant feedback)
- Challenge the question (to develop critical thinking)
- Builds a complete intellectual training experience.

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Fastest setup: Among current open-source solutions, it offers strong workflow completeness with the simplest setup steps.
- Zero-code usability: Based on the BISHENG workflow platform, a Q&A app can be completed by configuring it step by step.
- Complete experience: Covers core interactive links such as changing questions, guessing, and answer support, making it suitable for children's enlightenment scenarios.
- Highly accessible: Suitable as a first AI app-building project for non-technical users, with low learning and reuse cost.

subsections.title: 3.1.3 Implementation Details
content: [Practice Details](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/J4ucwrsuJiWRuWkffSpcly50n7d?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**
- Q&A response latency is below 1 second
- Supports 5 rounds of continuous interaction with users
**Core Technical Metrics**
- Average single-turn answer accuracy reaches 90%
**Other Value Returns**
- Can serve as the first workflow-building practice project for large-model enthusiasts
- Provides parents who need it with a zero-barrier solution for building a fun app for their own use
